popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara FitzHerbert於1482年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，她的父親John FitzHerbert50歲，母親Margaret de Babington28歲。她於大約1499年與Thomas Cokayne在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯享年34歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara FitzHerbert于1482年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，她的父亲John FitzHerbert50岁，母亲Margaret de Babington28岁。她于大约1499年与Thomas Cokayne在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯享年34岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara FitzHerbert was born in 1482, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, her father, John FitzHerbert, was 50 and her mother, Margaret de Babington, was 28. She married Thomas Cokayne about 1499, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1516, in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara FitzHerbert est née en 1482, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John FitzHerbert, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Babington, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cokayne environ 1499, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Polesworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara FitzHerbert 1482 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John FitzHerbert 50 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Babington 28. Sie hat um 1499 in Derbyshire, England Thomas Cokayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1516 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara FitzHerbertが1482年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父John FitzHerbertは50歳，母Margaret de Babingtonは28歳であった。約1499年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでThomas Cokayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアポレスウオルスで34歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara FitzHerbert(이)가 1482년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzHerbert(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Babington(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1499년 영국 더비실르에서 Thomas Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 포레스워스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara FitzHerbert nasceu em 1482, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John FitzHerbert, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Babington, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cokayne aproximadamente 1499, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1516, em Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ro.of Pooley Hall, Warwickshire, England: Hall End, Warwickshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara FitzHerbert родилась в 1482 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John FitzHerbert было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Babington, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cokayne около 1499 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности полесворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Cokayne aproximadamente 1499, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1516, en Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
